languages.text: "Конечно, Ваша Светлость. Ваше появление неизбежно приведет к переменам, а их мало кто любит. Некоторые из наших считают, что воссоединение с Империумом не принесет ничего хорошего из-за истории полка. Есть, конечно, и другие, вроде меня. Они не боятся встречи со слугами Его и ждут дня, когда мы вернемся на службу Человечеству. Просто раньше эти разногласия были поводом потрепаться в патруле, а теперь... Но вы не подумайте, они все принесут присягу! Тем, кто не готов это делать, мы сами даруем последнее искупление".

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Your arrival is bound to bring change, and few people are fond of change. Some believe that rejoining the Imperium will lead to trouble because of the regiment's history. There are others, like myself, of course, who have no fear of meeting His servants, and we look forward to the day when we can return to serving Humanity. These disagreements have never been anything more than a reason to chew the fat on patrol, but now... Regardless, all of us will swear the oath, you can be sure of that! If anyone refuses, we'll grant them final atonement ourselves."
languages.original_text: "Конечно, Ваша Светлость. Ваше появление неизбежно приведет к переменам, а их мало кто любит. Некоторые из наших считают, что воссоединение с Империумом не принесет ничего хорошего из-за истории полка. Есть, конечно, и другие, вроде меня. traits.locale_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Your arrival is bound to bring change, and few take kindly to such things. Some of us believe that rejoining the Imperium will lead to nothing good because of the regiment's history. There are others, of course, like myself, who have no fear of meeting His servants, and we look forward to the day when we return to serving Humanity. These disagreements have never been anything more than a reason to chew the fat on patrol, but now... Regardless, all of us will swear the oath, you can be sure of that! If anyone refuses, we'll grant them final atonement ourselves."

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Your arrival is bound to bring change, and few take willing to such things. Some believe that rejoining the Imperium will lead to trouble because of the regiment's history. There are others, like myself, of course, who have no fear of meeting His servants, and we look forward to the day when we can return to serving Humanity. These disagreements have never been anything more than a reason to chew the fat on patrol, but now... Regardless, all of us will swear the oath, you can be sure of that! If anyone refuses, we'll grant them final atonement ourselves."

"It's a whole movement, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Its origins date back to the First Call-Up. They believe that rejoining the Imperium will lead to nothing good because of the regiment's history. Others, like myself, have no fear of meeting His servants, and we look forward to the day when we return to serving Holy Terra. These disagreements have never been a genuine problem — just a topic of argument around the campfire or a reason to chew the fat on patrol. As my mother used to tell me, our faith gives us hope, and their fears help us resign ourselves to captivity on Zarkov."

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, which is hardly surprising. You've brought us change, and few people take kindly to change. Some of us believe that rejoining the Imperium will lead to nothing good because of the regiment's history. There are others, of course, like myself, who have no fear of meeting His servants, and we look forward to the day when we return to serving Humanity. These disagreements have never been anything more than a reason to chew the fat on patrol, but now... Regardless, all of us will swear the oath, you can be sure of that! If anyone refuses, we'll grant them final atonement ourselves."

languages.text: 「閣下、あれは一つの運動なのです。その起源は第一次召集まで遡ります。彼らは連隊の歴史ゆえ、帝国に復帰しても良いことはないと信じています。私のように、陛下のしもべたちと相まみえることを恐れず、聖テラに再び仕える日を心待ちにしている者もいます。とはいえ、こうした意見の相違が深刻な問題になったことは一度もありません。焚き火を囲んで言い合う話題や、哨戒中の与太話の種になる程度です。母がよく言っていたように、私たちの信仰は希望を与え、そして彼らの恐れは、ザルコフで囚われの身である現状を受け入れる助けになっているのです」
languages.original_text: "It's a whole movement, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Its origins date back to the First Call-Up. They believe that rejoining the Imperium will lead to nothing good because of the regiment's history. Others, like myself, have no fear of meeting His servants, and we look forward to the day when we return to serving Holy Terra. These disagreements have never been a genuine problem — just a topic of argument around the campfire or a reason to chew the fat on patrol. As my mother used to tell me, our faith gives us hope, and their fears help us resign ourselves to captivity on Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: 閣下、あれは一つの運動なのです。その起源は第一次召集まで遡ります。彼らは連隊の歴史ゆえ、帝国に復帰しても良いことはないと信じています。私のように、陛下のしもべたちと相まみえることを恐れず、聖テラに再び仕える日を心待ちにしている者もいます。とはいえ、こうした意見の相違が深刻な問題になったことは一度もありません。焚き火を囲んで言い合う話題や、哨戒中の与太話の種になる程度です。母がよく言っていたように、私たちの信仰は希望を与え、そして彼らの恐れは、ザルコフで囚われの身である現状を受け入れる助けになっているのです。

languages.text: « C'est exact, Votre Seigneurie. Votre arrivée est annonciatrice de changement, et rares sont ceux qui s'en réjouissent. Certains pensent qu'il n'est pas dans notre intérêt de rejoindre l'Imperium en raison du passé du régiment. D'autres, bien sûr, comme moi-même, n'ont pas peur de rencontrer les serviteurs de l'Empereur. Au contraire, nous attendons avec impatience le jour où nous recommencerons à servir l'humanité. Ces désaccords n'ont jamais été qu'un simple sujet de conversation lors des patrouilles, mais aujourd'hui... Quoi qu'il en soit, nous prêterons tous serment, je peux vous l'assurer ! Si l'un d'entre nous refuse, nous lui accorderons son expiation finale nous-mêmes. »
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Your arrival is bound to bring change, and few take willing to such things. Some believe that rejoining the Imperium will lead to trouble because of the regiment's history. There are others, like myself, of course, who have no fear of meeting His servants, and we look forward to the day when we can return to serving Humanity. These disagreements have never been anything more than a reason to chew the fat on patrol, but now... Regardless, all of us will swear the oath, you can be sure of that! If anyone refuses, we'll grant them final atonement ourselves."

Ces désaccords n'ont jamais été qu'un simple sujet de conversation lors des patrouilles, mais aujourd'hui... Quoi qu'il en soit, nous prêterons tous serment, je peux vous l'assurer ! Si l'un d'entre nous refuse, nous lui accorderons son expiation finale nous-mêmes. »

languages.text: "Evet {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Gelişinizin değişikliklere neden olacağı kesin. Çok az insan değişime sıcak bakar. Bazısı, alayın geçmişi nedeniyle İmparatorluk'a yeniden katılmanın başımızı belaya sokacağına inanıyor. Elbette benim gibi O'nun hizmetkârlarıyla karşılaşmaktan korkmayan, İnsanlığa hizmet etmeye döneceğimiz günü iple çekenler de var. Bu anlaşmazlıklar devriyelerde tartışma konusu olmaktan öteye gitmedi ama şimdi... Ne olursa olsun, hepimiz yemin edeceğiz. Bundan emin olabilirsiniz! Reddeden olursa da son kefaretini biz bahşedeceğiz."
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Your arrival is bound to bring change, and few take willing to such things. Some believe that rejoining the Imperium will lead to trouble because of the regiment's history. There are others, like myself, of course, who have no fear of meeting His servants, and we look forward to the day when we can return to serving Humanity. If anyone refuses, we'll grant them final atonement ourselves."

Reddeden olursa da son kefaretini biz bahşedeceğiz."

languages.text: "Ja, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Eure Ankunft ist mit Veränderungen verbunden, und das gefällt den Leuten nicht. Einige glauben, eine Rückkehr in das Imperium bedeutet angesichts der Historie des Regiments nichts als Ärger. Es gibt natürlich auch Leute wie mich, die keine Angst haben, Seine Diener zu treffen, und wir freuen uns auf den Tag, an dem wir aufs Neue der Menschheit dienen können. Diese unterschiedlichen Auffassungen waren nie mehr als ein Schwätzchen auf Patrouille, aber jetzt ... Egal, wir werden den Eid alle ablegen, darauf könnt Ihr Euch verlassen! Sollte sich jemand weigern, werden wir selbst für seine Sühne sorgen."
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Your arrival is bound to bring change, and few take willing to such things. Some believe that rejoining the Imperium will lead to trouble because of the regiment's history. There are others, like myself, of course, who have no fear of meeting His servants, and we look forward to the day when we can return to serving Humanity. These disagreements have never been anything more than a reason to chew the fat on patrol, but now... Regardless, all of us will swear the oath, you can be sure of that! If anyone refuses, we'll grant them final atonement ourselves."

Sollte sich jemand weigern, werden wir selbst für seine Sühne sorgen."

languages.text: «No se sorprenda por ello, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Su presencia trae cambios, y eso no suele gustarle a nadie. Algunos de los nuestros creen que volver al Imperium solo acarreará más desgracias, dado el historial del regimiento. Otros, como yo, no tenemos miedo al encuentro con Sus sirvientes y anhelamos poder volver a servir a la Humanidad. Hasta ahora, este desacuerdo solo era una excusa para charlar durante las patrullas, pero ahora... Bueno, todos nosotros prestaremos el juramento, ¡se lo aseguro! Y si alguien se negara, le otorgaríamos la expiación final nosotros mismos».
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Your arrival is bound to bring change, and few take willing to such things. Some believe that rejoining the Imperium will lead to trouble because of the regiment's history. There are others, like myself, of course, who have no fear of meeting His servants, and we look forward to the day when we can return to serving Humanity. These disagreements have never been anything more than a reason to chew the fat on patrol, but now... Regardless, all of us will swear the oath, you can be sure of that! If anyone refuses, we'll grant them final atonement ourselves."

Otros, como yo, no tenemos miedo al encuentro con Sus sirvientes y anhelamos poder volver a servir a la Humanidad. Hasta ahora, este desacuerdo solo era una excusa para charlar durante las patrullas, pero ahora... Bueno, todos nosotros prestaremos el juramento, ¡se lo aseguro! Y si alguien se negara, le otorgaríamos la expiación final nosotros mismos».

languages.text: “是的，大人。您的到来注定会带来改变，而大多数人都不愿意接受变化。有些人认为，鉴于我们军团的历史，重归帝国只会招来麻烦。当然，还有像我这样的人，我们并不害怕面对祂的仆人，反而盼着有一天能重新为人类效力。这些分歧从前不过是巡逻时斗嘴磨牙的由头，可现在……不管怎样，所有人都会宣誓效忠，这点您尽管放心！要是有谁不肯，我们会亲自给予他们最后的赎罪。”
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Your arrival is bound to bring change, and few take willing to such things. If anyone refuses, we'll grant them final atonement ourselves."
